title: Carboxylic acids
summary: 9701 A Level carboxylic acids — structure, acidity, reactions, and derivatives.
learningObjectives: Explain acidity and dimer hydrogen bonding.
Describe reactions with bases and carbonates.

simpleExplanation.title: Weak organic acids
simpleExplanation.summary: The –COOH group is weakly acidic. A Level covers fuller reaction sets and derivative pathways.

sections.content: **Carboxylic acids** (33.1) link **18.1 AS** content to **esters, amides, and acyl chlorides** at A Level.
